## Study: branches-family

The Branches family battery: regularity, monophyly, clean outgroup, inventory closure, divergence magnitude/reality, and homophony (raw, core-restricted, and draw-vs-merger attributed) over the goblinoid family (goblin, hobgoblin, bugbear) against the kobold outgroup, seed-swept over 1,000 worlds (spec §3, Task 10) — so the family properties hold as all-seed invariants, not seed-42 facts.

Seeds 0..1000 × 1 pin set(s); 1000 rows; 0 refusals.
